text.title: System Design Process Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (brief, stakeholders, constraints, current diagrams)?

text.example: Brief: 'launch order-tracking dashboard'. Phase 1: capture stakeholders + success. Phase 2: 100 DAU, 50 reads/sec, p95 200ms, 99.5% availability. Phase 3: C4 L1 + L2 + ADR for Postgres + ADR for Redis cache. Phase 4: capacity sanity (cap 250 RPS), anti-pattern scan (none), peer reviewer approves. Phase 5: package published.
